galeria.title: Projects brought to life with our fabrics
galeria.texto: Explore each project by clicking on the image to discover the fabric.

colony.title: NEW COLLECTION COLONY WALLPAPER
colony.description: Tokio is a collection inspired by the harmony between tradition and modernity. Its refined textures and subtle patterns combined with a balanced color palette to create elegant and welcoming spaces full of character. This collection brings warmth, visual rhythm and sophistication to contemporary interiors.

tokio.title: NEW COLLECTION TOKIO
tokio.description: Colony Wallpaper is a collection that invites you to transform spaces with the freshness of nature and the elegance of decorative design. Flowers, leavesand organic patterns merge with soft, harmonious color palettes to create serene, balanced environments full of character. This versatile collection that brings warmth, texture and style to both contemporary and classic interiors.
